betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Italian & Pasta§f

§aCraft pasta dishes, pizza, and Italian classics.§f

Italian cuisine uses the §bSkillet§f, §bCutting Board§f, and §bBakeware§f. Most dishes restore §e3-14 hunger§f.

§6Pasta§f: Spaghetti (3), Spaghetti and Meatballs (5), Lasagna (6), Mushroom Lasagna (7), Broccoli Mac (4), Spaghetti Dinner (13), Squid Ink Spaghetti (2).

§6Pizza§f: Pizza, Supreme Pizza (14), Anchovy Pepperoni Pizza, BBQ Chicken Pizza (9), Ham and Pineapple Pizza (9), Meat Feast Pizza (24).

§6Other§f: Chicken Pot Pie (7), Shepherd's Pie (8), Meat Pie (10), Spinach Pie (10), Cottage Pie (8).

§6Crafting Tools§f:
§b• Skillet§f: Spaghetti, Spaghetti and Meatballs, Lasagna, Mushroom Lasagna, Broccoli Mac.
§b• Cutting Board§f: Pizza, Supreme Pizza, Meat Feast Pizza, Anchovy Pepperoni Pizza.
§b• Bakeware§f: Chicken Pot Pie, Shepherd's Pie, Meat Pie, Spinach Pie, Cottage Pie.

§eTip§f: Supreme Pizza (14 hunger) and Meat Feast Pizza (24 hunger) are among the highest-restoration foods in the game.
